## Branch / commit convention
- Branch: `feature/HK-XXX-short-description` | `fix/HK-XXX-...` | `chore/HK-XXX-...`
- Commits follow: `feat|fix|chore|docs|test|refactor(HK-XXX): description`

## How to test
1. `npm install` (if new deps added)
2. `npm run dev`
3. <!-- specific steps -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Code runs locally (`npm run dev` — no crashes)
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] No `.env`, secrets, or IDE files added
- [ ] README / docs updated if needed
- [ ] PR title follows `feat|fix|chore(HK-XXX): description`
